author: Rafatz
name: .NET Docker Background Worker
description: A .NET background worker service packaged as a Docker container, with GitHub Actions workflows to build and publish to GitHub Container Registry.

DotnetName.description: Full .NET root namespace and project name prefix, e.g. MyCompany.MyWorker.

DotnetShortName.description: Derived short name (last segment of DotnetName), used for class names.

GithubOwner.description: GitHub username or organization that owns the repository (used in docker-compose image URL).

GithubName.description: GitHub repository name in kebab-case, e.g. my-worker-service.
